name: kpneumo_hs11286_IS26_copy4
description: Insertion sequence IS26 copy 4 of 4 in this genome. 820 bp IS6-family element; major driver of antibiotic-resistance plasmid rearrangements; tandem IS26 builds composite transposons. IS elements are mobile and create paralog signal across distant genomic loci; reads from IS26 should be reported as multi-mapping.
